title: Leadership Academy 2026 for African Youth: 10-Week Virtual & In-Person Leadership Program Empowering the Next Generation of African Leaders
summary: The Leadership Academy 2026 is now officially open for applications from February 1st, 2026. Designed to equip young Africans with transformative leadership, personal development, and professional skills, this comprehensive program empowers the next generation of ethical, community-driven leaders across the continent. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(119); }); Organized by Leading Change Africa, the Leadership Academy is delivered through multiple formats virtual (English French) and select in-person cohorts in Burkina Faso and Mali ensuring accessibility across diverse African contexts. Application Windows: Virtual Leadership Academy (English French): February 1 28, 2026 In-Person Leadership Academy (Burkina Faso Mali): February 1 April 12, 2026 ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(127); }); The 10-week virtual program runs from April to June 2026. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(128); }); What Is the Leadership Academy? The Leadership Academy is a structured leadership development initiative designed to strengthen African youth by building foundational and advanced leadership capabilities. It combines digital learning, facilitated discussions, mentorship, applied projects, and peer collaboration. The program is rooted in the belief that Africa s transformation depends on values-driven, socially responsible leaders equipped with modern professional and digital skills. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(129); }); Through a blended learning approach, participants gain practical tools to: Lead themselves with clarity and integrity Influence others effectively Develop strategic thinking capabilities Build collaborative networks Apply leadership knowledge to real community challenges Program Formats: Choose Your Leadership Academy Track The Leadership Academy is structured to accommodate diverse learning needs and geographic realities. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(130); }); 1. Virtual Leadership Academy (English French) The Virtual Leadership Academy is a 10-week online experience delivered via the YAM.edu platform. It includes: Self-paced learning modules Facilitated live virtual sessions Assignments and reflective exercises Group projects Personalized mentorship Peer-to-peer collaboration Access to guest speakers through the Inspiring Journeys Series This format allows African youth across the continent to participate regardless of location. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(131); }); Application Window: February 1 28, 2026 Program Period: April June 2026 2. In-Person Leadership Academy (Burkina Faso Mali) The in-person track provides hands-on leadership development through: Physical workshops Community engagement projects Direct mentorship Experiential leadership activities These cohorts are location-based and subject to availability and selection criteria. Application Window: February 1 April 12, 2026 Program Objectives The Leadership Academy aims to: Develop transformative leadership capacity among African youth Strengthen self-awareness, integrity, communication, and ethical decision-making Bridge theory and practice through real-life case studies and applied group projects ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(132); }); Strengthen digital and professional skills needed in modern African and global contexts Foster strong mentorship networks and peer collaboration Equip participants to create sustainable impact within their communities The program is built around the belief that leadership is both personal and societal requiring reflection, responsibility, and action. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(133); }); Core Learning Areas Participants engage in structured modules covering: Foundations of Transformative Leadership Participants develop the ability to inspire trust, navigate complexity, and drive change through reflective practice and applied learning. Visionary Thinking Strategic Planning Learners build skills to craft compelling visions and convert them into strategic, actionable plans for long-term success. Collaboration Networking Participants learn how to build professional networks, manage diverse perspectives, and cultivate partnerships that enhance personal and organizational growth. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(134); }); Ethical Leadership Integrity Strong emphasis is placed on values-driven leadership and responsible decision-making within African contexts. Program Structure Weekly Commitment The 10-week virtual program blends: Self-paced modules Weekly virtual sessions Assignments Group collaboration Reflection exercises Mentor feedback Participants are expected to fully engage in the learning journey, committing consistent weekly time to sessions, coursework, and collaboration. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(135); }); What Makes the Leadership Academy Unique? The Leadership Academy stands out because of: A blended virtual and in-person delivery model Africa-focused leadership curriculum Practical, application-oriented learning Strong mentorship and alumni network Emphasis on community-driven leadership Exposure to real-world leaders through the Inspiring Journeys Series The program does not focus on abstract theory alone it prioritizes actionable leadership development. Eligibility Criteria Applicants must: Be African youth aged 18 35 years Hold citizenship of an African nation Be passionate about leadership and personal development Be able to fully participate in the 10-week virtual program (April June 2026) ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(136); }); Be proficient in English (for English track) or French (for French track) Have access to an internet-enabled device and stable internet connection ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(137); }); Eligibility requirements may vary slightly by program track. Applicants are encouraged to review the specific track requirements before applying. Technical Requirements For virtual participants: Laptop or smartphone Stable internet connection Ability to access the YAM.edu platform Availability for live virtual sessions Program Outcomes After completing the Leadership Academy, participants gain: Enhanced leadership and professional skills Increased self-awareness and emotional intelligence Expanded pan-African network Access to mentors and alumni community Practical leadership project experience Stronger strategic planning abilities Exposure to cross-sector leadership insights ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(138); }); The Academy aims to create long-term leadership pipelines across Africa. Application Process Applications are open starting February 1, 2026. Applicants must select their preferred track: English Virtual Leadership Academy French Virtual Leadership Academy Burkina Faso In-Person Academy Mali In-Person Academy (subject to confirmation) Applicants are advised to apply early within the application window. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(139); }); Why You Should Apply If you are an African youth committed to leadership, personal growth, and community impact, the Leadership Academy provides: Structured leadership development Real-world learning experiences Mentorship from experienced leaders Cross-border networking opportunities Exposure to African leadership ecosystems Practical skills applicable in careers, entrepreneurship, and public service This is more than a program it is a leadership transformation journey. ezstandalone.cmd.push(function () { ezstandalone.showAds(140); }); Application Timeline Summary Virtual Leadership Academy: February 1 28, 2026 Program runs April June 2026 In-Person Leadership Academy: February 1 April 12, 2026 Learn more about the Virtual Leadership Academy 2026 HERE . Submit your application HERE . Visit here for more global opportunities on OFY.
